//: sapstack MCP server registration for Kiro IDE (v1.5.0+)
Exposes sapstack's knowledge base and Evidence Loop session tools to Kiro.
Works on a local sapstack clone — no live SAP connection is ever made.
1. Clone sapstack into your workspace (or as a submodule)
2. cd sapstack/mcp && npm install && npm run build
3. Save this file — Kiro auto-reconnects on save
Auto-approval policy (Universal Rule #5 — simulate before production change):
- Read-only tools are auto-approved for frictionless exploration
- Write/mutation tools require manual confirmation every time
SAPSTACK_ROOT      — path to the sapstack repo (where plugins/, data/, schemas/ live)
SAPSTACK_WORKSPACE — where .sapstack/sessions/ lives (usually same as workspace root)
Adjust these if sapstack is a submodule — e.g. ${workspaceFolder}/sapstack
